site.default_description: BerriBlue is a Warsaw-based Polish/Irish painter and street artist, specialising in azulejo — glazed ceramic tile in the Portuguese tradition. Her work can be found on walls across Europe and in private collections internationally.

home.title: BerriBlue | Fine Art
home.description: BerriBlue is a Warsaw-based Polish/Irish painter and street artist, specialising in azulejo — glazed ceramic tile in the Portuguese tradition. Her work can be found on walls across Europe and in private collections internationally.

about.title: About BerriBlue
about.description: BerriBlue is a Polish/Irish painter and street artist based in Warsaw. Working in azulejo, paste-up and painting, her work explores identity, mortality, and the personal — placed on walls across Europe and held in private collections internationally.

work-azulejo.title: BerriBlue | Azulejos
work-azulejo.description: BerriBlue is a Warsaw-based painter and street artist working in azulejo — glazed ceramic tile in the Portuguese tradition. Studio works from 2021 to present.

work-street-art.title: BerriBlue | Street Art
work-street-art.description: BerriBlue is known for her azulejo street art work — murals of glazed ceramic tiles installed on walls across Europe, from Warsaw and Porto to Paris, London, and Athens.

work-painting.title: BerriBlue | Painting
work-painting.description: BerriBlue is a Warsaw-based painter working on paper, canvas, and plywood.

for-sale.title: BerriBlue | Work For Sale
for-sale.description: Original azulejo and painting artworks by BerriBlue available to purchase. For commissions or other enquiries, contact info@berriblue.com.

scarves.title: BerriBlue | Silk Scarves
scarves.description: Illustrated silk scarves by BerriBlue — each one hand-printed with unique imagery on pure silk with hand-rolled hems. A wearable piece of original art.

exhibitions.title: BerriBlue | Exhibitions
exhibitions.description: Exhibition history of artist BerriBlue — solo and group shows across Europe including the Florence Biennale, galleries in Porto, Warsaw, Paris, and Dublin, from 2012 to present.

press.title: BerriBlue | Press
press.description: A list of Interviews, features, and exhibition coverage. For press enquiries or interviews, please contact info at berriblue dot com.

map.title: BerriBlue | Street Art Map
map.description: A map of BerriBlue's street art works across Europe — find her azulejo (ceramic tile) pieces on walls in Warsaw, Porto, Paris, Lisbon, London, Athens, Berlin, and more.

contact.title: BerriBlue | Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with BerriBlue for commissions, gallery enquiries, press, or collaborations. Reach out via email or Instagram.
